div1.entryFree: Necessaries, things indispensable, whether to a certain purpose: we have culled such n. as are behoveful for our state to-morrow, Rom. IV, 3, 7. or in daily use: linens, stuffs and n. Tp. I, 2, 164. to safeguard n. H5 I, 2, 176 (== provisions). == luggage: Gent. II, 4, 188. Hml. I, 3, 1. Oth. II, 1, 292.
